findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 34. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The NC state logo/seal image present in the PDF header is missing from the HTML rendering.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows an NC state logo with tree and 'Energy, Mineral & Land Resources' text in the upper left. The HTML rendering does not display this logo image.

findings.description: The HTML inserts repeated header/footer content (PAT McCRORY Governor, DONALD R. VAN DER VAART Secretary, TRACY DAVIS Director, and footer address block) between pages, disrupting the reading flow.
findings.evidence: PDF pages transition cleanly from page content to next page content. HTML chunk 2 shows the footer address block followed immediately by the header official names (PAT McCRORY, etc.) and then the MEMORANDUM heading again, creating a duplicate reading of the memo header that doesn't occur in the PDF's reading flow.

findings.description: The Attachments section in the PDF uses Roman numeral labels (I through VI) aligned in a structured list format. The HTML preserves this content but the numbering labels appear slightly differently formatted.
findings.evidence: PDF page 7 shows Roman numerals I-VI as a cleanly indented list under section IV Attachments. HTML renders the same content with the same Roman numerals, so this is preserved adequately.
